tiktok.caption: You're not getting free shipping. You're spending $978 a year extra to avoid a $5 fee. Here's the math.

youtube_short.title: Free Shipping Is Costing You $978 a Year
title_alternatives: The Free Shipping Trick Retailers Use to Empty Your Wallet
Why 'Free' Shipping Costs You Almost $1,000 a Year
youtube_short.description: That free shipping button isn't saving you money — it's one of the most profitable psychological tricks in retail. Studies show 70% of online shoppers add items to their cart just to hit the free shipping threshold, spending an average of $14 extra per order. Do that across a year of online shopping and you've blown $978 to avoid a five-dollar fee. And 46% of those filler items barely get used. The fix is one question: would you drive to a store for that item? If not, just pay the shipping. #personalfinance #moneytips #onlineshopping #savemoney #shoppinghacks #financialfreedom

hook_line: Free shipping is costing you $978 a year
